queries.question: Who made the film about the highest rated film?
queries.sql: SELECT name FROM Producer JOIN Documentary ON Documentary.producer_id =  Producer.id JOIN Movie ON  Movie.foreign_key =  Documentary.id  JOIN Review  On Review.movie_id =  Movie.id ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?producer a :Producer .
  ?documentary a :Documentary .
  ?documentary p:hasProducer ?producer .
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?movie p:hasDocumentary ?documentary .
  ?review a :Review .
  ?review p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?producer p:name ?name .
  ?review p:rating ?rating_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?rating_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Who made the film about the highest rated film?

queries.question: Who made the film about the highest rated film?
queries.sql: SELECT Company.name, Producer.name FROM Producer JOIN Documentary ON Documentary.producer_id =  Producer.id JOIN Movie ON  Movie.foreign_key =  Documentary.id  JOIN Review  On Review.movie_id =  Movie.id JOIN Company ON Documentary.Company_id =  Company.id  ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?producer a :Producer .
  ?documentary a :Documentary .
  ?documentary p:hasProducer ?producer .
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?movie p:hasDocumentary ?documentary .
  ?review a :Review .
  ?review p:hasMovie ?movie .
  ?company a :Company .
  ?documentary p:hasCompany ?company .
  ?company p:name ?name .
  ?producer p:name ?name2 .
  ?review p:rating ?rating_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?rating_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Who produced a documentary about the highest-grossing film?
queries.sql: SELECT name FROM Producer JOIN Documentary ON Documentary.producer_id =  Producer.id JOIN Movie ON  Movie.foreign_key =  Documentary.id ORDER BY box_office DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?producer a :Producer .
  ?documentary a :Documentary .
  ?documentary p:hasProducer ?producer .
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?movie p:hasDocumentary ?documentary .
  ?producer p:name ?name .
  ?movie p:box_office ?box_office_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?box_office_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Show the producer and company that made a documentary about the highest-grossing film.
queries.sql: SELECT Company.name, Producer.name FROM Producer JOIN Documentary ON Documentary.producer_id =  Producer.id JOIN Movie ON  Movie.foreign_key =  Documentary.id JOIN Company ON Documentary.Company_id =  Company.id ORDER BY box_office DESC LIMIT 1;

  ?producer a :Producer .
  ?documentary a :Documentary .
  ?documentary p:hasProducer ?producer .
  ?movie a :Movie .
  ?movie p:hasDocumentary ?documentary .
  ?company a :Company .
  ?documentary p:hasCompany ?company .
  ?company p:name ?name .
  ?producer p:name ?name2 .
  ?movie p:box_office ?box_office_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?box_office_o)
LIMIT 1
